arts.ttl: Why isn’t Vinicius Jr playing for Real Madrid against Liverpool today in the Champions League?
arts.sum: The game between Liverpool - Real Madrid will be played on Wednesday November 27 at Anfield, with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT . “ It’s in Mbappé‘s hands", “Anfield needs the best Mbappé" and “Mbappé can ignite the debate" all shout at him to do something the oldies will remember he used to: score goals for Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Chelsea exile returns to training amid contract ultimatum and Real Madrid links

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp's final Liverpool gesture hailed as key to Reds title charge - 'A huge moment'
arts.sum: Liverpool have enjoyed a fine start to life under Arne Slot but a former Reds defender has given Jurgen Klopp an unlikely assist after watching his old club open up a healthy lead at the Premier League summit

arts.ttl: Spanish media go overly dramatic about Liverpool fireworks – More than ‘100 shots’ at 3.15am
arts.sum: There’s usually fireworks on the pitch when Liverpool take on Real Madrid but unfortunately for the Spanish side, it was fireworks off it in the early hours of Wednesday. That’s at least according to El Chiringuito, who report that there has been a ‘boycott’ of the Spanish team, with fireworks set off outside their hotel The post Spanish media go overly dramatic about Liverpool fireworks – More than ‘100 shots’ at 3.15am appeared first on Sport Witness.
